texto: Sports is the common denominator in the world that brings everyone together. If there's any one place in the world where there is equality, it is probably sports. That was something that didn't always exist. We've come a long way in sports. Why can't society use sports as a way to bring people together and create change?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Stephen M. Ross que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Sports is the common denominator in the world that brings everyone together. If there's any one p…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, change, together, com foco em mudanca e together.
